workspace.title: Your workspace at a glance
workspace.summary: Workspaces keep teams and projects together while each project remains independently organized.

organize.title: A home for your team
organize.description: Use a workspace to group the projects, members, source language, and shared settings that belong to one team or production.

projects.title: Projects contain the actual story
projects.description: Each project has its own sheets, flows, scenes, localization, assets, and exports. Start blank or create one from a reusable template.

collaborate.title: Invite people with the right access
collaborate.description: Owners and admins can manage workspace members. Project roles then control who can edit or only review each production.

sheets.title: Build a living world with Sheets
sheets.summary: Sheets turn characters, locations, items, and game state into structured data your narrative can use.

structure.title: Model anything with typed blocks
structure.description: Combine text, numbers, choices, tables, galleries, references, and more to create a structure that fits each kind of entity.

variables.title: Connect data to narrative logic
variables.description: Non-constant blocks become variables. Flows can read them in conditions and update them with instructions using stable shortcuts.

inheritance.title: Reuse structure through inheritance
inheritance.description: Organize sheets as a tree and let parent blocks cascade to children, keeping shared definitions consistent without duplicating work.

flows.title: Shape branching stories with Flows
flows.summary: Flows combine dialogue, choices, conditions, and state changes on a visual node canvas.

canvas.title: Connect the path of the story
canvas.description: Create nodes from the dock and drag between their pins. Entry starts execution, while Exit defines how the flow finishes or continues.

logic.title: Branch and change the world
logic.description: Condition nodes choose a path from sheet variables. Instruction nodes update those variables as the narrative progresses.

test.title: Test without leaving the editor
test.description: Use the player for the audience experience or Debug Mode to step through nodes, inspect variables, and understand every decision.

scenes.title: Map narrative spaces with Scenes
scenes.summary: Scenes place story logic on spatial canvases for maps, locations, routes, and interactive exploration.

canvas.title: Start with a spatial canvas
canvas.description: Add a background, choose an appropriate scale, and use the scene tree to organize maps from broad worlds down to individual places.

elements.title: Add zones, pins, routes, and layers
elements.description: Zones define areas, pins mark points of interest, connections describe routes, and layers control what collaborators can see.

exploration.title: Turn the map into an experience
exploration.description: Attach conditions, actions, child scenes, and flows to spatial elements, then test the result in fullscreen Exploration Mode.

localization.title: Take every line to every language
localization.summary: Localization extracts narrative text, tracks translation progress, and keeps review and voice-over work visible.

languages.title: Configure source and target languages
languages.description: The workspace defines the source language. Add each target language from project settings before beginning translation work.

sync.title: Sync content as the story changes
sync.description: Synchronization extracts translatable text from flows and sheets, preserves stable references, and detects source updates that need review.

review.title: Translate, review, and track delivery
review.description: Work manually or with DeepL, move entries through their review states, and monitor words, speakers, completion, and voice-over progress.

export.title: Deliver production-ready narrative data
export.summary: Export converts the current project into engine-friendly formats with explicit content and asset options.

format.title: Choose the target format
format.description: Select the engine or narrative runtime first. Storyarn adapts the available content sections and file extension to that serializer.

validate.title: Validate before delivery
validate.description: Run validation to catch missing entries, broken references, unreachable nodes, empty dialogue, and other production risks before download.

deliver.title: Control content and assets
deliver.description: Choose which project sections to include and whether assets remain references, are embedded, or are bundled alongside the exported data.
